stories.title: Add require_admin to all unauthenticated endpoints
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/signal-config stays public (no secrets, by design)

stories.title: Whitelist sort parameter in /api/decisions to prevent injection
acceptanceCriteria: sort param validated against whitelist before getattr
Invalid sort value falls back to created_at silently

stories.title: Make .env writes atomic via temp-file + os.replace
acceptanceCriteria: _persist_env_updates in auth.py writes to temp file in same directory

stories.title: Validate credentials before allowing live/testnet mode switch
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/admin/mode raises 400 with missing fields list when switching to live without all 4 Polymarket credentials
POST /api/admin/mode raises 400 when switching to testnet without POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY

stories.title: Add confirmation guard to /api/bot/reset
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/bot/reset requires ResetRequest body with confirm: bool
Returns 400 if confirm is not true
Existing reset logic unchanged when confirm=true

stories.title: Route simulate_trade through execute_decision for risk controls
acceptanceCriteria: simulate_trade builds decision dict and calls execute_decision()
No direct Trade() construction in simulate_trade
Risk manager, duplicate check, bankroll deduction flow through execute_decision
Returns 404 if signal not found, 400 if trade rejected

stories.title: Add token auth to /ws/markets and /ws/whales
acceptanceCriteria: /ws/markets closes with 1008 if ADMIN_API_KEY set and token wrong
/ws/whales closes with 1008 if ADMIN_API_KEY set and token wrong

stories.title: Fix DB session leak in copy_trading.py get_copy_signals
acceptanceCriteria: get_copy_signals uses try/finally to close SessionLocal()

stories.title: Cap unbounded limit query params at 500
Document in-process rate limiter limitation
acceptanceCriteria: rate_limiter.py comment notes dict resets on restart and multi-worker bypass
Comment suggests Redis-backed alternative for production

stories.title: Fix expired trade PnL for live mode
acceptanceCriteria: Paper mode expired trade: pnl = trade.size (stake returned to paper bankroll)
Non-paper mode expired trade: pnl = 0 (on-chain handles real refund; no in-system double-credit)

stories.title: Add WalletConfig/CreatedWallet/WalletBalance TypeScript types to types.ts
acceptanceCriteria: WalletConfig interface exported with id, address, pseudonym, source, tags, enabled, added_at
CreatedWallet interface exported with address, message
WalletBalance interface exported with address, usdc_balance, last_updated, source

stories.title: Sanitize raw exception strings in 500 error responses
acceptanceCriteria: Backtest endpoints catch exceptions and return generic message without raw str(e)
Strategy run-now endpoint returns generic message on failure
Exception detail logged server-side, not exposed to client
